subject: Extract Operator.Inbox module
description: Create lib/ichor/operator/inbox.ex (mkdir -p the directory first) with write(type, payload) as single write path for ~/.claude/inbox/ notifications. Only TWO callers exist (not three -- Runner does not write to inbox): AgentWatchdog (lib/ichor/signals/agent_watchdog.ex:183-207 write_inbox_notification/3) and TeamWatchdog (lib/ichor/archon/team_watchdog.ex:167-178 dispatch :notify_operator). Canonical schema: atom-keyed map %{type: atom, payload: map, timestamp: DateTime, id: UUID}. Filename convention: {type}_{short_context}_{timestamp}.json.
goal: One write path for operator inbox notifications with consistent schema
acceptance_criteria: Operator.Inbox.write/2 exists and writes JSON to ~/.claude/inbox/
AgentWatchdog no longer writes inbox files directly
TeamWatchdog no longer writes inbox files directly
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes

subject: Remove AgentWatchdog duplicate functions
description: Audit lib/ichor/signals/agent_watchdog.ex for any private functions that duplicate logic in EscalationEngine or PaneScanner. Some named duplicates (process_escalations/6, maybe_escalate/8, etc.) may already be removed from prior refactoring. The goal is to verify: every escalation call routes through EscalationEngine, every pane scan call routes through PaneScanner, no unused private functions remain. Also remove any stale @module_attributes (like @capture_lines) that are no longer used.
goal: No duplicate escalation/pane logic in the watchdog GenServer
acceptance_criteria: All escalation calls route through EscalationEngine module
All pane scan calls route through PaneScanner module
No unused private functions or module attributes
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes (zero unused function warnings)

subject: Fix EventBridge raw PubSub calls
description: Replace Phoenix.PubSub.unsubscribe/2 (line 77) and Phoenix.PubSub.subscribe/2 (line 288) in lib/ichor/signals/event_bridge.ex with Ichor.Signals.unsubscribe/2 and Ichor.Signals.subscribe/2. Note: Ichor.Signals already has scoped subscribe/2 and unsubscribe/2 variants -- no new functions needed. IMPORTANT: EventBridge.handle_info matches raw map broadcasts (%{event: dag_delta, session_id: sid}) from the raw PubSub topic. After switching to Ichor.Signals.subscribe, the message format changes to %Ichor.Signals.Message{}. The handle_info pattern must be updated to match the new Message struct format.
goal: All PubSub subscriptions go through Ichor.Signals facade
acceptance_criteria: No direct Phoenix.PubSub calls in event_bridge.ex
All subscriptions use Ichor.Signals.subscribe
handle_info patterns updated to match Signals.Message struct
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes

subject: Move EventBridge to Mesh namespace
description: Move lib/ichor/signals/event_bridge.ex to lib/ichor/mesh/event_bridge.ex. Rename module from Ichor.Signals.EventBridge to Ichor.Mesh.EventBridge. Update all callers (grep -rn 'Signals.EventBridge' lib/ test/). Update Mesh.Supervisor (line 21) to reference Ichor.Mesh.EventBridge. Move old file to tmp/trash/.
goal: EventBridge lives in the Mesh namespace where it is supervised
acceptance_criteria: lib/ichor/mesh/event_bridge.ex exists with module Ichor.Mesh.EventBridge
lib/ichor/signals/event_bridge.ex moved to tmp/trash/
All callers updated (including test files)
Mesh.Supervisor references correct module
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
! test -f lib/ichor/signals/event_bridge.ex

subject: Move MemoriesClient to Infrastructure
description: Move lib/ichor/archon/memories_client.ex to lib/ichor/infrastructure/memories_client.ex. Rename module from Ichor.Archon.MemoriesClient to Ichor.Infrastructure.MemoriesClient. FIVE callers exist (not three): (1) lib/ichor/factory/research_store.ex, (2) lib/ichor/factory/research_ingestor.ex, (3) lib/ichor/memories_bridge.ex, (4) lib/ichor/archon/memory.ex (3 call sites using alias), (5) lib/ichor/archon/chat.ex (uses Application.get_env(:ichor, :archon_memories_client_module, MemoriesClient) for dynamic resolution). Update all 5 callers. Also check config/config.exs and config/test.exs for the :archon_memories_client_module app env default.
goal: Shared HTTP client lives in Infrastructure, not Archon
acceptance_criteria: lib/ichor/infrastructure/memories_client.ex exists
lib/ichor/archon/memories_client.ex moved to tmp/trash/
All 5 callers updated
Application.get_env default updated if present in config
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes

subject: Extract shared prompt protocol module
description: Create lib/ichor/workshop/prompt_protocol.ex with shared prompt building functions: critical_rules(tool_prefix), roster_block(session, names), announce_ready(session_id), full_header(session, names, tool_prefix). Extract the verbatim CRITICAL RULES block from TeamPrompts, PipelinePrompts, and PlanningPrompts. Replace all copies with calls to PromptProtocol. Define @callback build_prompt(agent, context) :: String.t() as the behaviour contract (per-agent, returns string -- NOT build_prompts returning a map). Note: PlanningPrompts lives in lib/ichor/factory/ currently -- do NOT move it in this task (that is W3-4).
goal: Single source of truth for shared agent communication protocol text
acceptance_criteria: Workshop.PromptProtocol module exists with critical_rules/1, roster_block/2, announce_ready/1, full_header/3
CRITICAL RULES text appears only in prompt_protocol.ex
TeamPrompts, PipelinePrompts, PlanningPrompts call PromptProtocol instead of inlining
@callback build_prompt/2 defined
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes

subject: Add Ash action descriptions for Discovery
description: Add description strings to actions in Workshop.Team, Factory.Floor, and Signals.Operations. IMPORTANT: Workshop.Team uses defaults([:read, :destroy]) -- these must be converted to explicit action blocks before descriptions can be added (e.g., read :read do description(...) end). Do NOT consolidate Workshop.Agent spawn actions (that is W3-5 scope). Workshop.Agent actions already have descriptions -- verify and add any missing. For Signals.Operations.acknowledge_message: it is a no-op stub, add a description noting it is unimplemented, do not delete or implement it in this task. Focus: descriptions only, no structural changes.
goal: Every Ash action has a description suitable for Discovery catalog exposure
acceptance_criteria: All Workshop.Team actions have description strings (including explicit read/destroy)
All Factory.Floor actions have description strings
All Signals.Operations actions have description strings
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
